quicksight.template.explicithierarchy.Cf: The option that determines the hierarchy of the fields that are built within a visual's field wells. These fields can't be duplicated to other visuals.

quicksight.template.explicithierarchy.Co.Description: The list of columns that define the explicit hierarchy.

quicksight.template.explicithierarchy.Dr.Description: The option that determines the drill down filters for the explicit hierarchy.

quicksight.template.explicithierarchy.Hi.Description: The hierarchy ID of the explicit hierarchy.
